song.title: Go Light Your World
song.author: Chris Rice
song.presentation: V1 C V2 C V3 C
song.lyrics:
[V1] .G C G C . G D There is a candle in every soul, . C G D Some brightly burning, some dark and cold, . G D There is a Spirit who brings a fire, . C D G D Ignites a candle and make His home.
[C] . G C Carry your candle, run to the darkness . G Em D Seek out the hopeless, confused and torn, . G C Hold out your candle for all to see it, . G D B Em C Take your candle, go light your world. . G D G (F to next verse) Take your candle, go light your world.
[V2] Frustrated brother, see how he’s tried to Light his own candle some other way. See now your sister, she’s been robbed and lied to, Still holds a candle without a flame.
[V3] We are a family| whose hearts are blazing. So let’s raise our candles| and light up the sky, Praying to our Father, “In the name of Jesus, Make us a beacon in darkest times!”
